title: Dunphy's Corner (The Rocky Road To Dublin)
content:
Pacing slowly down the road
        Black horses go, with load on load
        Of Dublin people dead, and they
        Will be covered up in clay.

        Ere their friends go home, each man
        Will shake his head, and drain a can
        To Dublin people we will meet
        Not again in Grafton Street.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, James Stephens delivers a powerful performance in "Dunphy's Corner (The Rocky Road To Dublin)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
